title: PricingModel
description: Pricing Model Schema — a structured, computable representation of a vendor's pricing. Implementations may add top-level fields without breaking conformance with the standard. Part of The Value Project open standard. Schema license: Apache-2.0 (https://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0). Copyright 2026 The Value Project (https://github.com/The-Value-Project/pricing-models).

x-license.copyright: Copyright 2026 The Value Project (an initiative by ValueIQ — https://valueiq.ai)

required.description: True if mandatory for the product.

type.description: flat=fixed, per_unit=amount×qty, tiered=graduated bands, volume=all units at band price.

anyOf.description: What the price is per. Null for flat.

metric_type.description: consumable=depletes/resets, capacity=concurrent limit, cumulative=grows, one_time=granted once.

features.description: Human-readable features provided by this module.

tiers.description: Plan levels including sets of modules.

included_modules.description: Module IDs included in this tier.

metric_type.description: consumable=depletes/resets, capacity=concurrent limit, cumulative=grows, one_time=granted once.

overage_policy.description: What happens when entitlements are exhausted.
